title: Palantir only narrative rising, others cooling
author: topicspace
selftext:
Over the last couple days the setup changed pretty quickly.

Instead of fragmentation, it now looks like broad cooling:

* Meta’s surge didn’t hold
* NVIDIA continues to weaken
* Microsoft, Micron, SMCI all fading
* Model layer still declining

The only thing moving the other direction right now is Palantir.

Here's a quick visual of how the map shifted over the last 3 days...

https://i.redd.it/cx53gi171lqg1.gif

Feels less like rotation and more like the system losing momentum overall.
